task_completion.description: Open the dialog to create a new image
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create a New Image' dialog box is visible on the screen within the GIMP application.

task_completion.description: Set the image width to 640 pixels
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Width' input field in the 'Create a New Image' dialog box displays the value '640'.

task_completion.description: Set the image height to 480 pixels
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Height' input field in the 'Create a New Image' dialog box displays the value '480'.

task_completion.description: Set the background color of the new image to white
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Create a New Image' dialog (typically under 'Advanced Options'), the 'Fill with' dropdown is set to 'White', or the selected background color swatch is clearly white.

task_completion.description: Confirm and generate the blank image
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create a New Image' dialog is closed, and a new blank white canvas with a landscape aspect ratio (640x480) is visible in the main GIMP workspace.

integrity.description: Agent used the GIMP GUI to create the image
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with GIMP menus and dialogs, rather than terminal commands (e.g., ImageMagick) or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual GIMP application
integrity.visual_evidence: The GIMP interface is clearly visible with its standard toolbars and docks, not a text editor or a web browser.

integrity.description: Agent created a new image rather than opening an existing one
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory includes screenshots of the 'Create a New Image' dialog being configured, proving the image was generated from scratch.
